reviews.raw_text: طلبوا مني اصور البطاقة عشان ارجع المنتج، الصورة رفضت اكتر من مرة ومش عارف اكمل الاسترجاع
reviews.claude_summary: User's ID photo was rejected repeatedly during the return flow, blocking the refund.

reviews.raw_text: Why do they need my national ID just to return a product. Seems excessive for a simple return.
reviews.claude_summary: User questions why ID verification is required for a return.

reviews.raw_text: التحقق من الهوية كان سريع جدا لما رجعت المنتج، ما توقعتش يكون بالسهولة دي
reviews.claude_summary: User praises the fast ID verification during the return flow.

reviews.raw_text: Seller registration asked for a photo of my ID and it kept failing on a blurry camera step.
reviews.claude_summary: Seller registration ID photo step fails repeatedly due to camera issues.

reviews.raw_text: حسابي البائع لسه قيد المراجعة من كذا يوم ومحدش بيرد عليا
reviews.claude_summary: Seller account stuck in review for days with no support response.

reviews.raw_text: The app asked me to scan my ID and take a selfie, both worked on the first try. Account opened in under five minutes.
reviews.claude_summary: User praises fast, smooth ID scan and facematch during account opening.

reviews.raw_text: قالي الوش مش متطابق مع البطاقة بعد ما صورت اكتر من مرة، مش عارف المشكلة فين
reviews.claude_summary: Facematch repeatedly rejects the user despite multiple attempts.

reviews.raw_text: Phone verification code never arrived while opening my trading account, had to try three times.
reviews.claude_summary: SMS verification code delayed during account opening onboarding.

reviews.raw_text: Trading fees are a bit high compared to other apps I have used.
reviews.claude_summary: User comments on trading fees, unrelated to onboarding verification.

reviews.raw_text: اسمي مكتوب غلط بعد ما رفعت جواز السفر، فيه مشكلة في تحويل الاسم من العربي للانجليزي
reviews.claude_summary: Name transliteration error after passport upload during wallet signup.

reviews.raw_text: Wallet setup rejected my ID twice then accepted it the third time with no explanation of what changed.
reviews.claude_summary: ID document rejected twice before acceptance, no reason given.

reviews.raw_text: ياريت يكون في خيار اني ارفع صورة البطاقة من المعرض مش بس كاميرا
reviews.claude_summary: User requests a gallery upload option instead of camera-only ID capture.

reviews.raw_text: Sending money to friends is really convenient once the wallet is set up.
reviews.claude_summary: User praises money transfer convenience, unrelated to onboarding.

reviews.raw_text: Had to take a selfie ten times before my first ride, the liveness check kept timing out.
reviews.claude_summary: Liveness check times out repeatedly before the rider's first ride is unlocked.

reviews.raw_text: تسجيل الدخول وتوثيق الهوية كان سهل قوي وسريع قبل اول رحلة
reviews.claude_summary: User praises easy, fast identity verification before their first ride.

reviews.raw_text: Scooter battery died halfway through my ride and there was no swap station nearby.
reviews.claude_summary: Scooter hardware and charging complaint, unrelated to onboarding.

reviews.raw_text: رفضوني على طول بعد ما صورت البطاقة وعملت السيلفي، مش فاهم ليه
reviews.claude_summary: Application rejected immediately after ID photo and selfie with no reason given.

reviews.raw_text: In-branch service was slow but the staff were friendly and helpful.
reviews.claude_summary: User praises in-branch service, unrelated to digital onboarding.
